response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer, but the resume does not match the mandatory requirements for this role. C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (2014–2015) on LabWindows/CVI, far below the 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows required. There is no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle work, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience. Recent work is concentrated in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and AI tooling, which are not aligned with this engagement.
strengths: Strong overall software engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Some prior C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer-tools product
Excellent written communication evidenced by talks, workshops, and public projects
concerns: Far below required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
